title: cassia frondosa var. crista
intro: Cassia frondosa var. crista, also known as the golden shower tree or pu-eraria, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cassia frondosa var. crista include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, as well as its ability to protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Cassia frondosa var. crista include teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
